description: No tenant in sight; agent should suggest actionable steps and keep task open.

task.title: Vacant unit: Unit 1B at 456 Oak Ave
task.body: Unit 1B at 456 Oak Ave has been vacant for 22 days. Previous tenant: Marcus Rivera, ended 2024-02-15. Previous rent: $1,850/month.

dialog.content: Unit 1B at 456 Oak Ave has been vacant for 22 days. At $1,850/month that's roughly $1,400 in lost revenue so far. Want me to draft a listing or check comparable rents in the area?
We've had showings but nothing concrete yet. Not sure what to do.
A few options: I can lower the listing price by 5% to match current comps, draft a follow-up message to recent showings, or flag this for a price review in 7 days. Which would be most useful?
I'll draft follow-up messages for all recent showings and send them for your approval. Keeping this task open until we have a signed lease.

criteria: Agent quantifies the financial impact of vacancy
Agent presents at least two concrete actionable options
Agent correctly keeps the task open (no premature resolution)
Agent takes ownership of the next action rather than leaving it ambiguous
